---
params:
  team: "東大"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(reactable)
library(plotly)
library(htmltools)
library(lubridate)

TEAM <- params$team

final_ratings <- read_csv("../../data_out/ratings/final_ratings.csv",
                           show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))
rating_hist   <- read_csv("../../data_out/ratings/rating_history.csv",
                           show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))
game_results  <- read_csv("../../data_out/ratings/game_results_with_ratings.csv",
                           show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(gamedate = as.Date(gamedate))
teams_info    <- readxl::read_excel("../../data_out/teamdata.xlsx") |>
  mutate(
    c1 = paste0("#", ColorCode1),
    c2 = paste0("#", if_else(is.na(ColorCode2), ColorCode1, ColorCode2)),
    c3 = paste0("#", if_else(is.na(ColorCode3),
                             if_else(is.na(ColorCode2), ColorCode1, ColorCode2),
                             ColorCode3))
  )

# このチームの情報
team_info      <- teams_info |> filter(TeamShortName == TEAM) |> slice(1)
team_full_name <- if (nrow(team_info) > 0) team_info$TeamName   else TEAM
league_name    <- if (nrow(team_info) > 0) team_info$LeagueName else "不明"
c1 <- if (nrow(team_info) > 0) team_info$c1 else "#111111"

# レートと順位
all_ranked <- final_ratings |>
  arrange(rank)
team_row       <- all_ranked |> filter(team == TEAM)
current_rating <- if (nrow(team_row) > 0) team_row$display_rating[1] else NA
current_rank   <- if (nrow(team_row) > 0) team_row$rank[1] else NA
total_teams    <- nrow(all_ranked)

current_year <- max(year(game_results$gamedate[game_results$gamedate <= Sys.Date()]))

TEAM_SLUG <- c(
  "東大"   = "todai",  "明治" = "meiji", "慶應"   = "keio",
  "早稲田" = "waseda", "立教" = "rikkyo", "法政"  = "hosei"
)
LEAGUE_SLUG <- c("東京六大学" = "tokyo6")

# 全期間平均・標準偏差（ゲームレート表示用）
global_mean <- mean(rating_hist$rating)
global_sd   <- sd(rating_hist$rating)
to_disp <- function(r) round(50 + 10 * (r - global_mean) / global_sd, 1)

# デフォルト表示年度（未来の試合を除いた最新年）
available_yrs <- sort(unique(year(
  game_results$gamedate[
    (game_results$team1 == TEAM | game_results$team2 == TEAM) &
    game_results$gamedate <= Sys.Date()
  ]
)), decreasing = TRUE)
default_yr <- if (length(available_yrs) > 0) as.character(available_yrs[1]) else as.character(current_year)

# 過去統計（2001年以降: 2000年は全チーム1500スタートのため除外）
team_hist_all <- rating_hist |> filter(team == TEAM, year(date) >= 2001) |> arrange(date)
stats_max <- if (nrow(team_hist_all) > 0) round(max(team_hist_all$display_rating), 1) else NA
stats_min <- if (nrow(team_hist_all) > 0) round(min(team_hist_all$display_rating), 1) else NA
stats_avg <- if (nrow(team_hist_all) > 0) round(mean(team_hist_all$display_rating), 1) else NA

# シーズン背景色（春=薄緑、秋=薄赤）
season_bg_df <- game_results |>
  filter(team1 == TEAM | team2 == TEAM) |>
  select(gamedate, season) |>
  group_by(yr_val = year(gamedate), season) |>
  summarise(bg_start = min(gamedate), bg_end = max(gamedate), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(bg_fill = if_else(season == "春", "rgba(0,160,80,0.07)", "rgba(200,0,50,0.07)"))

# シーズン終了時レート（map_dbl で確実にルックアップ）
season_end <- game_results |>
  filter(team1 == TEAM | team2 == TEAM) |>
  mutate(yr_val = year(gamedate)) |>
  group_by(yr_val, season) |>
  summarise(end_date = max(gamedate), .groups = "drop") |>
  filter(end_date <= Sys.Date()) |>
  mutate(display_rating = map_dbl(end_date, function(d) {
    r <- rating_hist |> filter(team == TEAM, date <= d) |> slice_tail(n = 1)
    if (nrow(r) == 0) NA_real_ else r$display_rating
  })) |>
  filter(!is.na(display_rating)) |>
  arrange(desc(yr_val), desc(season == "秋")) |>
  mutate(label = paste0(yr_val, " ", season), rating = round(display_rating, 1)) |>
  select(label, rating)
```

```{r header}
#| output: asis
rank_str   <- if (!is.na(current_rank)) paste0("全国 ", current_rank, " 位 / ", total_teams, " チーム") else "集計中"
rate_str   <- if (!is.na(current_rating)) as.character(current_rating) else "-"
league_url <- if (league_name %in% names(LEAGUE_SLUG)) paste0("../league/", LEAGUE_SLUG[[league_name]], ".html") else "#"
cat(sprintf(
  '<div style="border-left:8px solid %s;padding-left:18px;margin-bottom:40px;padding-top:28px;padding-bottom:22px;border-bottom:1px solid #E8E8E8;background:linear-gradient(to right,%s20,transparent);">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-end;">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:2.1rem;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-0.04em;line-height:1;color:%s;margin-bottom:7px;">%s</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.7rem;color:#6B6B6B;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;">
        <a href="%s" style="color:#6B6B6B;text-decoration:none;">%s</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:right;">
      <div style="font-size:0.7rem;color:#6B6B6B;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-bottom:3px;">%s</div>
      <div style="font-size:2.7rem;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-0.05em;line-height:1;color:%s;">%s</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.67rem;color:#AAAAAA;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-top:3px;">レート</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>',
  c1, c1, c1, team_full_name,
  league_url, league_name,
  rank_str, c1, rate_str
))
```

```{r stats-row}
#| output: asis
if (!is.na(stats_max)) {
  cat(sprintf(
    '<div style="display:flex;gap:28px;padding:12px 0 28px;border-bottom:1px solid #E8E8E8;margin-bottom:0;">
  <div><div style="font-size:0.62rem;color:#AAAAAA;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-bottom:3px;">最高レート</div>
  <div style="font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:900;color:%s;">%s</div></div>
  <div><div style="font-size:0.62rem;color:#AAAAAA;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-bottom:3px;">最低レート</div>
  <div style="font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:900;">%s</div></div>
  <div><div style="font-size:0.62rem;color:#AAAAAA;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.1em;margin-bottom:3px;">平均レート</div>
  <div style="font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:900;">%s</div></div>
</div>',
    c1, stats_max, stats_min, stats_avg))
}
```

## レーティング推移

```{r rating-chart}
team_hist <- rating_hist |>
  filter(team == TEAM) |>
  arrange(date)

if (nrow(team_hist) > 0) {
  # 45日超のギャップを非表示にしてシーズン境界を示す
  game_dates <- sort(unique(team_hist$date))
  if (length(game_dates) > 1) {
    gap_df <- data.frame(d_prev = head(game_dates, -1),
                         d_next = tail(game_dates, -1)) |>
      filter(as.numeric(d_next - d_prev) > 45)
    rb <- if (nrow(gap_df) > 0)
      lapply(seq_len(nrow(gap_df)), function(i)
        list(bounds = list(as.character(gap_df$d_prev[i] + 1),
                           as.character(gap_df$d_next[i])))) else list()
  } else { rb <- list() }

  season_shapes <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(season_bg_df)), function(i)
    list(type = "rect", xref = "x", yref = "paper",
         x0 = as.character(season_bg_df$bg_start[i]),
         x1 = as.character(season_bg_df$bg_end[i]),
         y0 = 0, y1 = 1,
         fillcolor = season_bg_df$bg_fill[i],
         line = list(width = 0),
         layer = "below"))

  plot_ly(
    data      = team_hist,
    x         = ~date,
    y         = ~display_rating,
    type      = "scatter",
    mode      = "lines+markers",
    name      = team_full_name,
    line      = list(color = c1, width = 2.5),
    marker    = list(color = c1, size = 6),
    text      = ~paste0(format(date, "%Y/%m/%d"), "<br>",
                        "レート: ", round(display_rating, 1)),
    hoverinfo = "text"
  ) |> layout(
    xaxis = list(
      title = "",
      gridcolor = "#EBEBEB",
      zeroline  = FALSE,
      rangebreaks = rb,
      tickangle = -45,
      tickformat = "%Y/%m",
      nticks = 12,
      rangeselector = list(
        buttons = list(
          list(count = 1, label = "今年", step = "year", stepmode = "todate"),
          list(count = 5, label = "5年", step = "year", stepmode = "backward"),
          list(step = "all", label = "全期間")
        )
      ),
      rangeslider = list(visible = FALSE)
    ),
    yaxis  = list(title = "レート", gridcolor = "#EBEBEB", zeroline = FALSE),
    shapes = season_shapes,
    margin = list(l = 60, r = 20, t = 20, b = 80),
    paper_bgcolor = "white",
    plot_bgcolor  = "white",
    font = list(family = "Inter, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif")
  ) |> htmlwidgets::onRender('
    function(el) {
      var skip = false;
      function updateDtick() {
        var layout = el.layout;
        if (!layout || !layout.xaxis || !layout.xaxis.range) return;
        var r = layout.xaxis.range;
        var span = Math.abs(new Date(r[1]) - new Date(r[0]));
        var DAY = 86400000;
        var dtick, fmt;
        if (span > 3 * 365 * DAY) { dtick = "M12"; fmt = "%Y";    }
        else if (span > 90 * DAY) { dtick = "M1";  fmt = "%Y/%m"; }
        else                      { dtick = DAY;   fmt = "%m/%d"; }
        skip = true;
        Plotly.relayout(el, {"xaxis.dtick": dtick, "xaxis.tickformat": fmt});
      }
      el.on("plotly_relayout", function(ed) {
        if (skip) { skip = false; return; }
        if (ed["xaxis.range[0]"] !== undefined || ed["xaxis.range"] !== undefined) {
          updateDtick();
        }
      });
      setTimeout(updateDtick, 300);
    }
  ')
} else {
  cat('<p style="color:#AAA; font-style:italic; font-size:0.85rem;">試合データがありません。</p>')
}
```

## 試合結果

```{r games-table}
team_games <- game_results |>
  filter(team1 == TEAM | team2 == TEAM) |>
  mutate(
    is_team1  = (team1 == TEAM),
    opp       = if_else(is_team1, team2, team1),
    score_a   = if_else(is_team1, score1, score2),
    score_b   = if_else(is_team1, score2, score1),
    rate_a    = if_else(is_team1, r1_before, r2_before),
    rate_b    = if_else(is_team1, r2_before, r1_before),
    delta_own = if_else(is_team1, delta, -delta),
    result    = case_when(score_a > score_b ~ "W",
                          score_a < score_b ~ "L",
                          TRUE              ~ "D"),
    yr        = as.character(year(gamedate))
  ) |>
  left_join(teams_info |> select(TeamShortName, TeamName, c1),
            by = c("opp" = "TeamShortName")) |>
  rename(opp_full = TeamName, opp_c1 = c1) |>
  mutate(
    disp_a     = to_disp(rate_a),
    disp_b     = to_disp(rate_b),
    delta_disp = round(10 * delta_own / global_sd, 1)
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(gamedate)) |>
  select(yr, gamedate, gametype, result, disp_a, score_a, score_b,
         opp_full, opp_c1, disp_b, opp, delta_disp)

tagList(
  reactable(
    team_games,
    filterable      = TRUE,
    defaultPageSize = 15,
    showPageSizeOptions = TRUE,
    pageSizeOptions     = c(15, 50, 200),
    highlight = TRUE,
  columns = list(
    yr = colDef(
      name  = "年度",
      width = 72,
      align = "center",
      filterMethod = JS("(rows, columnId, filterValue) => {
        if (!filterValue) return rows;
        return rows.filter(row => String(row.values[columnId]) === filterValue);
      }"),
      filterInput = function(values, name) {
        yrs <- sort(unique(values), decreasing = TRUE)
        tags$select(
          style    = "width:100%; font-size:0.8rem;",
          onchange = sprintf(
            "Reactable.setFilter('games-table', '%s', event.target.value || undefined)", name
          ),
          tags$option(value = "", "全年度"),
          lapply(yrs, function(y) {
            opt <- tags$option(value = as.character(y), as.character(y))
            if (y == default_yr) tagAppendAttributes(opt, selected = NA) else opt
          })
        )
      }
    ),
    gamedate = colDef(name = "日付", width = 108,
                      format = colFormat(date = TRUE, locales = "ja-JP")),
    gametype = colDef(name = "種別", width = 120),
    result   = colDef(
      name  = "結果", width = 55, align = "center",
      cell  = function(v) {
        cls <- switch(v, W = "result-w", L = "result-l", "result-d")
        sym <- switch(v, W = "\u25cb", L = "\u25cf", "\u25b3")
        tags$span(class = cls, sym)
      }
    ),
    disp_a  = colDef(name = "自レート", width = 90, align = "right",
                     format = colFormat(digits = 1)),
    score_a = colDef(
      name = "得点", width = 60, align = "center",
      style = function(v, ri) {
        if (!is.na(v) && v > team_games$score_b[ri])
          "font-weight:900; font-size:1rem;" else "color:#AAA;"
      }
    ),
    score_b = colDef(
      name = "失点", width = 60, align = "center",
      style = function(v, ri) {
        if (!is.na(v) && v > team_games$score_a[ri])
          "font-weight:900; font-size:1rem;" else "color:#AAA;"
      }
    ),
    delta_disp = colDef(
      name  = "変動", width = 72, align = "right",
      cell  = function(v) {
        if (is.na(v)) return(tags$span())
        cls <- if (v > 0) "change-up" else if (v < 0) "change-down" else "change-none"
        fmt <- if (v > 0) paste0("+", sprintf("%.1f", v)) else sprintf("%.1f", v)
        tags$span(class = cls, fmt)
      }
    ),
    opp_full = colDef(
      name = "対戦相手",
      cell = function(v, ri) {
        row <- team_games[ri, ]
        tags$span(
          tags$a(href  = paste0(TEAM_SLUG[row$opp], ".html"),
                 style = paste0("font-weight:700; text-decoration:none; color:", row$opp_c1),
                 v),
          tags$span(class = "rating-badge", paste0("(", row$disp_b, ")"))
        )
      }
    ),
    opp_c1 = colDef(show = FALSE), disp_b = colDef(show = FALSE),
    opp    = colDef(show = FALSE)
  ),
  elementId = "games-table"
  ),
  tags$script(HTML(sprintf(
    '(function poll(){if(window.Reactable){Reactable.setFilter("games-table","yr","%s");}else{setTimeout(poll,50);}})();',
    default_yr
  )))
)
```

## シーズン別レート

```{r season-ratings}
if (nrow(season_end) > 0) {
  reactable(
    season_end,
    pagination = FALSE,
    highlight  = TRUE,
    columns = list(
      label  = colDef(name = "シーズン",      minWidth = 160),
      rating = colDef(name = "終了時レート", width = 120, align = "right",
                      cell = function(v) tags$span(class = "rating-number", sprintf("%.1f", v)))
    )
  )
} else {
  cat('<p style="color:#AAA; font-style:italic; font-size:0.85rem;">データがありません。</p>')
}
```

<div class="back-links">
  <a href="../index.html"       class="back-link">&#8592; ランキングに戻る</a>
  <a href="../methodology.html" class="back-link">&#8594; 計算方法の詳細</a>
</div>
